Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $43,799,818Details
International Box Office $26,387,270
Worldwide Box Office $70,187,088
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,440,236
Total $23,440,236

Legs:4.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,604 opening theaters/2,715 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $76,140,386

Movie Details

Video Release: October 30th, 2007 by Warner Home Video
